MBLTY_PRSTHTC_CD GG0120D Mobility Device - Limb prosthesis CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident used a limb prosthesis in the last seven days. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
891 MBLTY_NONE_CD MBLTY_NONE_CD GG0120Z Mobility Device - None of the Above CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident used none of the above mobility devices in the last seven days. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
892 SHWR_INTRM_CD SHWR_INTRM_CD GG0130E5 Shower/bathe self
